name: BrainPad Inc.
summary: BrainPad Inc. provides prediction/analysis, system integration, and digital marketing services in Japan. The company's prediction/analysis services consist of data analytics/prediction to suggested concrete action plans and measures; prediction scores; and machine learning/deep learning/optimization services, etc. It also offers automatic operational systems development services, such as system integration of prediction developed logics/algorithms and 3rd party analytics packages; and customer relationship management system consultation services. In addition, the company's digital marketing services comprise software as a service based marketing service, in house developed recommendations, and natural language analysis. BrainPad Inc. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
